ingredients.item:
BROKEN RICE
2¼ cups (520 ml) water
1 pound (454 g) broken rice (see Note), rinsed
ingredients.original:
BROKEN RICE
2¼ cups (520 ml) water
1 pound (454 g) broken rice (see Note), rinsed

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon water
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon water

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon sugar
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon sugar

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons char siu seasoning mix
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons char siu seasoning mix

ingredients.item: 7 ounces (200 g) store-bought or homemade seitan, cut into ½-inch (1 cm) thick steaks, or 3½ ounces (100 g) textured vegetable protein (see Note), soaked for 15 minutes in warm water and excess water squeezed out
ingredients.original: 7 ounces (200 g) store-bought or homemade seitan, cut into ½-inch (1 cm) thick steaks, or 3½ ounces (100 g) textured vegetable protein (see Note), soaked for 15 minutes in warm water and excess water squeezed out

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons vegetable oil
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons vegetable oil

ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon minced leek (white part only)

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon cornstarch
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon cornstarch

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons water
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons water

ingredients.item: 2 teaspoons annatto oil
ingredients.original: 2 teaspoons annatto oil

ingredients.original: 1 medium plum tomato, sliced

ingredients.item: 1 cup (240 ml) vegan fish dipping sauce
ingredients.original: 1 cup (240 ml) vegan fish dipping sauce

ingredients.item: 1. MAKE THE BROKEN RICE Combine 2¼ cups (520 ml) of water and broken rice in a medium saucepan with a tight-fitting lid and stir. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, and cook, uncovered, until the water level drops below the surface of the rice (about 5 minutes). Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for an additional 15 minutes without lifting the lid. Remove from heat and let stand for an additional 5 minutes. Fluff rice with a chopstick or fork.
ingredients.original: 1. MAKE THE BROKEN RICE Combine 2¼ cups (520 ml) of water and broken rice in a medium saucepan with a tight-fitting lid and stir. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, and cook, uncovered, until the water level drops below the surface of the rice (about 5 minutes). Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for an additional 15 minutes without lifting the lid. Remove from heat and let stand for an additional 5 minutes. Fluff rice with a chopstick or fork.

ingredients.item: 2. MAKE THE VEGAN PORK CHOPS In a large bowl, combine sesame oil, vegetarian oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon of water, 1 tablespoon of sugar, and char siu seasoning mix. Stir well until all solids are dissolved. Add seitan, toss to coat with the marinade, and let sit for 15 minutes.
ingredients.original: 2. MAKE THE VEGAN PORK CHOPS In a large bowl, combine sesame oil, vegetarian oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon of water, 1 tablespoon of sugar, and char siu seasoning mix. Stir well until all solids are dissolved. Add seitan, toss to coat with the marinade, and let sit for 15 minutes.
